name: PERRIGO Co plc
business: Perrigo is a leading pure-play self-care company providing over-the-counter health and wellness products. It sells store brand private label products and branded products in categories such as upper respiratory, nutrition, digestive health, pain and sleep-aids, oral care, healthy lifestyle, skin care, women's health, and vitamins, minerals, and supplements. Customers include major retail drug, supermarket, mass merchandise chains, e-commerce retailers, and wholesalers.

exposures.sentence: Perrigo is a leading pure-play self-care company with more than a century of providing high-quality health and wellness solutions to meet the evolving needs of consumers.

catalysts.event: Wind-down of Supply Chain Reinvention Program
catalysts.sentence: For the remaining project wind-down activities, we anticipate less than $10 million of additional costs to be incurred through fiscal year 2026.
